exam_format: 40-question multiple-choice exam, 60 minutes, 80% passing score. Agile mindset and ISO 42001 alignment emphasized.

testing_centers.provider: CertiProf Online Exam Platform (proctored options available)
testing_centers.notes: Exams are multiple-choice. Candidates have up to 6 months from purchase to take the exam. Digital badge issued by Badge Claimed upon successful completion. Certification valid for 3 years.

id_requirements: Valid ID for any proctored components; CertiProf account for exam access and badge claiming.
exam_rules: One attempt included with purchase. Closed book unless specified. Follow CertiProf exam policies.
renewal_options: 3-year validity. Renewal demonstrates continued competence in AI management and governance.

retake_policy.notes: Retake options can be unlocked per policy if needed. Vouchers are non-refundable once redeemed.

domains.name: AI Management System (AIMS) Implementation and Operation
Risk Identification, Assessment, and Mitigation for AI Systems
Governance, Control Mechanisms, and Organizational Alignment
Performance Monitoring, Evaluation, and Continuous Improvement
Responsible, Transparent, and Ethical AI Practices
